name: Centur-Ion Gargoyle II
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜騎兵</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>センチュリオン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ガーゴイル<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ⅱ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ツヴァイ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can send 1 face-up "Centur-Ion" card you control to the GY; Special Summon this card from your hand, also you cannot Special Summon "Centur-Ion Gargoyle II" for the rest of this turn. If this card is sent to the GY as Synchro Material: You can add this card to your hand. During the Main Phase, if this card is a Continuous Trap: You can Special Summon this card, then you can reduce its Level by 4. You can only use each effect of "Centur-Ion Gargoyle II" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can send 1 face-up "Centur-Ion" card you control to the GY; Special Summon this card from your hand, also you cannot Special Summon "Centur-Ion Gargoyle II" for the rest of this turn. If this card is sent to the GY as Synchro Material: You can add this card to your hand. During the Main Phase, if this card is a Continuous Trap: You can Special Summon this card, then you can reduce its Level by 4. You can only use each effect of "Centur-Ion Gargoyle II" once per turn.
eff: You can send 1 face-up "Centur-Ion" card you control to the GY; Special Summon this card from your hand, also you cannot Special Summon "Centur-Ion Gargoyle II" for the rest of this turn. If this card is sent to the GY as Synchro Material: You can add this card to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Centur-Ion Gargoyle II" once per turn.

action: Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
Activates if sent to the Graveyard
Activates if used as Synchro Material
Returns itself from field to hand
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons itself from your Spell & Trap Zone
